examples: Now go close to the latrine and put your face there.
Their 15 occupants share a single pit-latrine and outside water tap.
One night I went to the latrine while everyone went down to the basement break room.
Now they are using a latrine, using safe water both in drinking and household work, maintaining hygiene.
Like normal males, the mutant mice urinated in various spots around their cage (unlike females, who create a single latrine).
